name: @pryzm/plugin-column
description: PRYZM 2 — Column plugin (S12-T3). Headless half: Store<ColumnData>, typed errors, 5 handlers (CreateColumn / DeleteColumn / MoveColumn / SetColumnType / SetColumnHeight). Producer (packages/geometry-kernel/src/producers/column.ts) emits a BufferGeometryDescriptor via the linear-structural shared producer (rect / circular / I-section profiles). Committer / tool live under src/committer/.
